info.title: Intelligent Search API
info.description:
>ℹ️ Onboarding guide
>
Check the new [Search onboarding guide](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/search-overview). We created this guide to improve the onboarding experience for developers at VTEX. It assembles all documentation on our Developer Portal about Search and is organized by focusing on the developer's journey.

[VTEX Intelligent Search](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/3qgT47zY08biLP3d5os3DG) is a search solution for digital commerce that displays relevant results based on the catalog from the user's first interaction with the store.

## Intelligent Search v1 API

This reference documents the **v1** Intelligent Search API for headless integrations. It replaces the legacy API at `/api/io/_v/api/intelligent-search/*`.

The key difference from the legacy API: **v1 does not use the segment cookie** to fill in search context. All inputs — locale, sales channel, regionalization, and facets — must be sent as explicit query parameters and path segments. This makes v1 responses **HTTP-cacheable** with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600` for public sales channels on most routes.

## Common parameters

| **Parameter name** | **Description** |
| ------------------ | --------------- |
| `{{accountName}}` | Name of the VTEX account. Used as part of the URL. |
| `{{environment}}` | Environment to use. Used as part of the URL. |

servers.description: VTEX Intelligent Search v1 server URL.

accountName.description: Name of the VTEX account. Used as part of the URL.

environment.description: Environment to use. Used as part of the URL.

get.summary: Get list of the 10 most searched terms
get.description:
Lists the 10 most searched terms in the past 14 days.

For more information, check the Intelligent Search [Autocomplete](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/4gXFsEWjF7QF7UtI2GAvhL) guide.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Filter: return only popular terms that contain this text (case-insensitive).

get.summary: Get list of suggested terms and attributes similar to the search term
get.description:
Lists the suggested terms and attributes similar to the search term.

For more information, check the Intelligent Search [Autocomplete](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/4gXFsEWjF7QF7UtI2GAvhL) guide.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly — use `segment.cultureInfo` when migrating from segment-driven callers.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

get.summary: Get list of suggested terms similar to the search term
get.description:
Lists suggested terms similar to the search term.

For more information, check the Intelligent Search [Autocomplete](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/4gXFsEWjF7QF7UtI2GAvhL) guide.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly — use `segment.cultureInfo` when migrating from segment-driven callers.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

get.summary: Get attempt of correction of a misspelled term
get.description:
Tries to correct a misspelled term from the search.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly — use `segment.cultureInfo` when migrating from segment-driven callers.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

get.summary: Get list of banners registered for query
get.description:
Lists the banners registered for a given query. Check the [configuring banners documentation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/4ViKEivLJtJsvpaW0aqIQ5) for a full explanation of the banner feature.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly — use `segment.cultureInfo` when migrating from segment-driven callers.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

Lists the active products for a given query.

>⚠️ **Required facet:** Only the `trade-policy` facet is required in the path. All other facets are optional filters. The trade policy may also be provided via the `sc` query parameter instead.

>⚠️ **Fetching a single known product?** Use `GET` [Get product](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/intelligent-search-api-v1#get-/products) instead. It skips the search pipeline (lower latency) and caches better.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly (e.g. `segment.cultureInfo`).

>ℹ️ **Regionalization:** on v1, all regionalization context must be passed as explicit query parameters. Segment-selected facets must be appended to the URL path — v1 does not read them from the segment.

## Caching

- Organic (non-sponsored) responses for public sales channels: `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.
- Responses containing sponsored products: `Cache-Control: no-store`.
- Private sales-channel responses: not cached.

## Sponsored products (VTEX Ads)

The query parameters **`showSponsored`**, **`sponsoredCount`**, **`advertisementPlacement`**, and **`repeatSponsoredProducts`** apply only to stores using [VTEX Ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-ads). Sponsored products are merged into the `products` array. Responses that include sponsored products are returned with `Cache-Control: no-store`.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Defines how results are sorted. Relevance is the **default** sorting type, applied when this parameter is omitted, null, or empty.

Allowed values:
- **Omitted, empty, or null** (default): Results are sorted by relevance.
- `price:desc`: Results are sorted by price in descending order.
- `price:asc`: Results are sorted by price in ascending order.
- `orders:desc`: Results are sorted by the amount of orders in the past 90 days, in descending order.
- `name:desc`: Results are sorted by name in descending alphabetical order.
- `name:asc`: Results are sorted by name in ascending alphabetical order.
- `release:desc`: Results are sorted by release date in descending order.
- `discount:desc`: Results are sorted by discount percentage in descending order.

parameters.name: showSponsored
parameters.description: Defines if sponsored products are listed (`true`) or not (`false`). Applicable to stores using [VTEX Ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-ads) to offer ad space.

200.description:
OK

List of products for the given query.

products.description: Introducing our exquisite Top Wood Clock.

get.description:
Lists the possible facets for a given query.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly (e.g. `segment.cultureInfo`).

>ℹ️ **Regionalization:** on v1, all regionalization context must be passed as explicit query parameters. Segment-selected facets must be appended to the URL path.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

parameters.name: removeHiddenFacets
parameters.description: When `true`, hidden facets are omitted from the response.

200.description:
OK

List of facets for the given query.

get.description:
Retrieves a single product by a known identifier. Use this endpoint for product detail pages (PDP) when you have a specific product ID, slug, EAN, SKU ID, or reference.

>⚠️ **When to use this endpoint vs. product search:** Use this endpoint when you need data for **one specific product** whose identifier is already known (for example, rendering a PDP from a URL slug). **Do not** use it to fetch multiple products or to run a search query — use `GET` [Search products](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/intelligent-search-api-v1#get-/product-search/-facets-) for those cases. Misusing this endpoint for listings or search bypasses Intelligent Search ranking and impairs the shopper experience.

When called with `field=id` (the default), the product is looked up directly, **skipping the search pipeline** — resulting in lower latency and higher cache-hit likelihood than product search.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600` for public sales channels. Private sales-channel responses are not cached.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly (e.g. `segment.cultureInfo`).

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3) for public sales channels.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The identifier value to look up, interpreted according to the `field` parameter.

parameters.name: field
parameters.description:
Which identifier type `value` represents.

- `id` (default): product ID. Fastest — skips the search pipeline entirely.
- `slug`: product slug (link text).
- `ean`: SKU EAN.
- `sku`: SKU ID.
- `reference`: SKU reference ID (not the product reference).

parameters.name: productClusterId
parameters.description: Restrict to a cluster. Returns `404` if the product is not in this cluster.

parameters.name: productOriginVtex
parameters.description: When `true`, returns the product in Catalog (portal) format instead of Intelligent Search format.

parameters.name: show-invisible-items
parameters.description: When `true`, skips the catalog visibility (`isVisible`) check. Useful for preview and admin flows.

200.description:
OK

Single product object. The response is the product itself — there is no `recordsFiltered`, `pagination`, or `searchId` wrapper.

400.description: Bad Request — missing or invalid parameters (for example, missing `sc` or `value`).

401.description: Unauthorized — private sales channel requires valid authentication.

403.description: Forbidden — user is not allowed to access this resource.

404.description: Not Found — product not found, or not in the requested `productClusterId`.

get.summary: Get pickup point availability for Delivery Promise
get.description:
Retrieves the list of available pickup points with their IDs, distances, addresses, and business hours. This endpoint returns pickup points sorted by distance from the provided coordinates.

>⚠️ **Required facet:** Only the `trade-policy` (sales channel) facet is required. All other product filters are optional.

>ℹ️ This endpoint is designed for use in [Delivery Promise for headless stores](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/delivery-promise-for-headless-stores) implementations.

>ℹ️ **Locale:** on v1 the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send `locale` explicitly when needed.

>ℹ️ **Caching:** public sales-channel responses are cached with `Cache-Control: public, max-age=600`. Private sales-channel responses are not cached.

You can call this endpoint in two ways:

- **With country and ZIP code:** Provide `country` and `zip-code` to retrieve pickup points based on location.
- **With delivery zones and pickup hashes:** Provide pre-computed `deliveryZonesHash` and `pickupPointsHash` for faster lookup.

## Permissions

This endpoint does not require [authentication](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/authentication) or [permissions](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/license-manager-resources--3q6ztrC8YynQf6rdc6euk3).

parameters.name: deliveryZonesHash
parameters.description: Pre-computed hash for delivery zones. Required when using the hashes approach (alternative to country and ZIP code).

parameters.name: pickupPointsHash
parameters.description: Pre-computed hash for pickup points. Required when using the hashes approach (alternative to country and ZIP code).

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Three-letter country code in [ISO 3166 ALPHA-3](https://www.iban.com/country-codes) format. Required when using the country and ZIP code approach.

parameters.name: zip-code
parameters.description: ZIP code or postal code. Required when using the country and ZIP code approach.

parameters.name: coordinates
parameters.description: Geographic coordinates in the format `longitude,latitude`. Used to sort results by proximity. Optional — the server derives coordinates from `zip-code` and `country` when not provided.

parameters.name: pickupPoint
parameters.description: Pickup point ID to filter results to a specific pickup point.

pickupPointDistances.description: List of available pickup points sorted by distance ascending.

pickupId.description: Unique identifier for the pickup point.

distance.description: Distance from the provided coordinates to the pickup point, in kilometers.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the pickup point is currently active (`true`) or not (`false`).

address.description: Address details of the pickup point.

businessHours.description: Operating hours for each day of the week.

dayOfWeek.description: Day of the week (0 = Sunday, 1 = Monday, ..., 6 = Saturday).

400.description: Bad Request — delivery context could not be resolved (neither hashes nor country + ZIP code were usable), or invalid parameters.

query.name: query
query.description:
Search term. It can contain any character.

This parameter is named `query` in the API. The short form **`q`** is an alias for `query` and has the same semantics.

You can search for products or SKUs using specific ID types by adding search parameters at the end of the store URL:

- **Single item search:** `?query=[id type]:[id_1]`. Example: `?query=product:98765`
- **Multiple items search:** `?query=[id type]:[id_1];[id_2];[id_3]`. Example: `?query=product:98765;98743`

>⚠️ All searched IDs should be of the same type.

## Supported ID types

| ID Type | Query format | Example |
| - | - | - |
| Product ID | `?query=product:<id>` or `?query=product.id:<id>` | `?query=product:98765` |
| SKU ID | `?query=sku:<id>` or `?query=sku.id:<id>` | `?query=sku.id:12345` |
| Reference ID | `?query=sku.reference:<id>` | `?query=sku.reference:REF123` |
| EAN | `?query=sku.ean:<id>` | `?query=sku.ean:7891234567890` |
| Slug | `?query=product.link:<link>` | `?query=product.link:blue-shirt` |

facetsPath.name: facets
facetsPath.description:
## Format

The `facets` parameter follows the format: `/${facetKey1}/${facetValue1}/${facetKey2}/${facetValue2}/.../${facetKeyN}/${facetValueN}`.

>⚠️ **Required:** Only the `trade-policy` facet is mandatory. All other facets are optional filters.

The order in which the terms appear is not relevant to the search.

You can also repeat the same `facetKey` several times for different values. For example: `category-1/shoes/color/blue/color/red`.

## Filter combinations

- **Facets of the same type → OR (union):** When multiple values of the same facet are applied, the API returns the union of all products matching any of those values.
- **Facets of different types → AND (intersection):** When different facet types are combined, the API returns only products that satisfy all conditions simultaneously.

## Negative filters (NOT operator)

To exclude a facet value, prefix the value with **`not:`** in the path segment: `/{facetKey}/not:{facetValue}/`. For example, `color/blue/size/not:42` keeps color blue and excludes size 42.

## Available filters

| `facetKey` | Description | Example |
| - | - | - |
| `trade-policy` **(required)** | Filter by trade policy (sales channel). | `trade-policy/2` |
| `category-${n}` *(optional)* | Filter by category level (1 = department, 2 = category, 3 = subcategory, etc.). | `category-1/clothing/category-2/shirts` |
| `brand` *(optional)* | Filter by brand slug. | `brand/acme` |
| `{specificationName}` *(optional)* | Filter by catalog specification. | `color/blue` |
| `productClusterIds` *(optional)* | Filter by collection ID. | `productClusterIds/262` |
| `price` *(optional)* | Filter by price range `${minPrice}:${maxPrice}`. | `price/100:500` |

locale.name: locale
locale.description:
Indicates the target language as a BCP 47 language code. The Intelligent Search must have indexed the account in the target language.

>ℹ️ On v1, the segment cookie is not used as a locale fallback. Send this parameter explicitly — use `segment.cultureInfo` when migrating from segment-driven callers.

simulationBehavior.name: simulationBehavior
simulationBehavior.description:
Defines the pricing and availability simulation behavior.

- `default`: Calls the simulation for every single seller.
- `skip`: Never calls the simulation. Use for the fastest response when live pricing is not required.
- `only1P`: Only calls the simulation for first-party sellers.
- `only3P`: Only calls the simulation for third-party sellers.
- `regionalize1p`: Calls regionalized simulation for first-party sellers only.

hideUnavailableItems.name: hideUnavailableItems
hideUnavailableItems.description: Defines whether the result should hide unavailable items (`true`) or not (`false`). When set to `true`, only products with stock are returned.

sc.name: sc
sc.description: Sales channel (trade policy) ID. Alternative to including `trade-policy/{id}` in the facets path.

pickupPoint.name: pickupPoint
pickupPoint.description: Pickup point ID for pickup-in-point delivery context.

deliveryZonesHash.name: deliveryZonesHash
deliveryZonesHash.description: Pre-computed delivery zones hash for faster regionalization lookup. Obtain this value from the `POST` [Search delivery zones](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/delivery-promise-suggestions-api#post-/api/logistics-shipping/delivery-zones/_search/v2) endpoint of the Delivery Promise Suggestions API.

pickupPointsHash.name: pickupPointsHash
pickupPointsHash.description: Pre-computed pickup points hash for faster regionalization lookup. Obtain this value from the `POST` [Search pickup points](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/api-reference/delivery-promise-suggestions-api#post-/api/logistics-shipping/pickuppoints/_search) endpoint of the Delivery Promise Suggestions API.

utmSource.name: utmSource
utmSource.description: UTM source value, forwarded to the pricing and availability simulation. Replaces what the legacy API read from the segment cookie.

utmCampaign.name: utmCampaign
utmCampaign.description: UTM campaign value, forwarded to the pricing and availability simulation.

utmiCampaign.name: utmiCampaign
utmiCampaign.description: UTMi campaign value, forwarded to the pricing and availability simulation.

campaigns.name: campaigns
campaigns.description: Campaign identifier, forwarded to the pricing and availability simulation.

priceTables.name: priceTables
priceTables.description: Price table(s) to apply during simulation.

sponsoredCount.name: sponsoredCount
sponsoredCount.description: Amount of sponsored products to be returned. Applicable only to merchants using [VTEX Ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-ads).

advertisementPlacement.name: advertisementPlacement
advertisementPlacement.description: Advertisement placement. Applicable only to merchants using [VTEX Ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-ads).

repeatSponsoredProducts.name: repeatSponsoredProducts
repeatSponsoredProducts.description: When `true`, the same product can appear as both sponsored and organic. When `false`, sponsored products are removed from the organic list. Applicable only to merchants using [VTEX Ads](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-ads).

fuzzy.name: fuzzy
fuzzy.description: Indicates how the search engine will correct misspelled words by using fuzzy logic. It can be a number representing the max number of misspelled letters, or the string `auto` suggesting that the search engine should set this value by itself.

operator.name: operator
operator.description: Indicates how the search engine will deal with the full-text query if there is more than one word. Set `and` if the returned products must have all the words in its metadata, or `or` otherwise.

searches.description: List of suggested facets and terms.

count.description: Number of times the term was searched.

attributes.description: List of facets in which the term can be searched.

labelKey.description: Human-readable format of the facet key.

labelValue.description: Human-readable format of the facet value.

searches.description: List of the most searched terms in the past 14 days.

count.description: Number of times the term was searched.

correction.description: Object that indicates if the term was misspelled and suggests a possible correction.

misspelled.description: Defines whether the term was misspelled (`true`) or not (`false`).

correction.description: Defines whether the API was able to suggest a correction (`true`) or not (`false`).

text.description: The corrected term. Empty string when there is no correction.

highlighted.description: The corrected term with the corrected word highlighted using `<em>` tags. Empty string when there is no correction.

area.description: Banner area, which can be a number between 1 and 4, to be used in the store's [Banner](https://developers.vtex.com/docs/guides/vtex-search-banner) block.

html.description: Banner HTML, which can be an image or text.

searches.description: List of suggested terms ordered by frequency (descending).

count.description: Number of times the term was searched.

attributes.description: Optional category or attribute context for the suggestion. Omitted when absent.

products.description: List of active products. Includes any sponsored products when requested.

correction.description: Present when a spelling correction applies.

misspelled.description: Defines whether the search term is misspelled (`true`) or not (`false`).

fuzzy.description: Indicates how the search engine corrected the misspelled word by using fuzzy logic.

operator.description: Indicates how the search engine dealt with the full-text query when there is more than one word.

redirect.description: Redirect URL when the query maps to a configured redirect rule. Present only when a redirect applies.

translated.description: Defines whether the list of products was translated by Intelligent Search (`true`) or not (`false`).

options.description: Search options available for the query.

deliveryPromisesEnabled.description: Whether Delivery Promise features are enabled for this query.

searchId.description: Unique identifier for the search session. Use this value when sending search analytics events.

link.description: Product URL path in the store.

categoriesIds.description: List of category IDs in the corresponding category path.

productClusters.description: Product clusters (collections) the product belongs to.

sellerDefault.description: Whether this is the default seller.

AvailableQuantity.description: Indicates availability. `10000` means available; `0` means unavailable.

spotPrice.description: Special promotional price available under specific conditions, such as a discount for a specific payment method. May differ from `Price`.

BuyTogether.description: IDs of items that can be bought together with this item.

RewardValue.description: Credit the customer receives when finalizing an order that includes this SKU.

PriceValidUntil.description: Date until the price is valid, in ISO 8601 format.

CacheVersionUsedToCallCheckout.description: Cache version used to call Checkout.

conditions.description: Conditions for the promotion to be valid.

PaymentOptions.description: Payment options available for the seller's offer.

installmentOptions.description: Installment plans available, grouped by payment system.

value.description: Total value for this payment option.

installments.description: Installment breakdown for this payment option.

hasInterestRate.description: Whether the installment plan has interest.

paymentSystems.description: Payment systems available for the offer.

validator.description: Validation rules for the payment system.

isCustom.description: Whether it is a custom payment system.

imageTag.description: HTML tag for the selected image.

nameComplete.description: Combination of the product name and the SKU name.

unitMultiplier.description: Unit multiplier. If the multiplier is 5.0000, the product can be added in multiples of 5.

modalType.description: Links an unusual type of SKU to a carrier specialized in delivering it (e.g. `"Refrigerated products"`). See [How the modal works](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/how-does-the-modal-work--tutorials_125).

schema.description: Free-form JSON schema describing the attachment.

max_characters.description: Maximum number of characters allowed for the field.

isKit.description: Defines whether the SKU is a kit (`true`) or not (`false`).

kitItems.description: SKUs that compose the kit. Returned when `isKit` is `true`.

amount.description: Quantity of the component SKU per kit.

estimatedDateArrival.description: Estimated arrival date for the SKU, when configured.

origin.description: Origin of the product in the trade policy.

name.description: Human-readable format of the facet value.

selected.description: Defines whether the value is selected (`true`) or not (`false`).

type.description:
Facet type.

- `TEXT`: The value is a simple text.
- `PRICERANGE`: The value contains a `range` property with the minimum and maximum price.
- `DELIVERY`: The value represents a delivery or shipping option.

name.description: Human-readable format of the facet key.

hidden.description: Defines whether the client-side should hide the facet (`true`) or not (`false`).

sampling.description: Indicates whether there was sampling in the aggregation of facets. In search results with many products, only the first 30000 are aggregated to avoid performance issues.

breadcrumb.description: Generated breadcrumb for the given query.

queryArgs.description: Term and facets used in the query.

query.description: Search term used in the query.

translated.description: Defines whether the facets were translated by Intelligent Search (`true`) or not (`false`).
